hero_topics.title: AI Agents: Frontier Models
hero_topics.summary: OpenAI’s GPT-5.5 is the second model to complete one of our multi-step cyber-attack simulations end-to-end 🧵. ([OpenAI’s GPT-5.5 is the second model to complete one of our multi-step cyber-attack simulations end-to-end 🧵 https:/...](https://x.com/aisecurityinst/status/2049868227740565890)) Someone made a Geoguessr clone where you can travel through time 🤯 Cool use case of GPT-Image-2, which can make panoramas. ([Someone made a Geoguessr clone where you can travel through time 🤯 Cool use case of GPT-Image-2, which can make pano...](https://x.com/venturetwins/status/2048453326694646124)) GPT-5.5 is going to have a party for itself. it chose 5/5 at 5:55 pm for the date and time. if you'd like to come, le.... ([GPT-5.5 is going to have a party for itself. it chose 5/5 at 5:55 pm for the date and time. if you'd like to come, le...](https://x.com/sama/status/2049653810558353746)) DeepSeek just permanently cut cached input prices by 10x across the entire API 139× cheaper than GPT-5.5 and 83× cheaper than Claude Sonnet 4.6 btw. ([DeepSeek just permanently cut cached input prices by 10x across the entire API 139× cheaper than GPT-5.5 and 83× chea...](https://x.com/ns123abc/status/2048449231539593473)) Additional coverage spans 6 more items.
hero_topics.insight: This matters because model updates and official evaluations reset expectations for what agent stacks can attempt, while also creating new operating and safety assumptions. The multi-source signal is worth tracking for changes in capability, deployment friction, or operating risk.
